name: Job listing finder with Exa search and Google Sheets
description: Searches for job listings matching specified criteria using Exa, uses Claude AI to parse and score each listing against the user's preferences, and saves organized results to Google Sheets.

source.originalName: LinkedIn job finder automation using Bright Data API & Google Sheets

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for searching job listings

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving job results

jobQuery.description: Job search query (e.g. 'Senior Software Engineer remote React')

steps.name: Build Exa search query for job listings
Search for job listings with Exa
Build AI prompt for job listing analysis
Run Claude AI to analyze job listings
Format job listings for Google Sheets
Save job listings to Google Sheets
